metadata.description: Customer-facing POC skills for Treasure AI Studio (agent.eu01.treasure.ai). Built for the AI POC framework, Weeks 4–6 skill build phase. All skills are designed to run in Treasure AI Studio (no hooks, no filesystem writes, inline tracking via Step 0).

plugins.name: poc-skills
plugins.description: Customer-facing Data Ops POC skills for Treasure AI Studio. Covers full pipeline lineage tracing, data quality, and transformation dashboards. Each skill generates a self-contained HTML dashboard and logs usage to ai_usage.skills_usage_tracker on eu01.
